sections.title: Geographic Location and Area
paragraphs: Cairo is located in northern Egypt on the banks of the Nile River and is the political and cultural capital of the Arab Republic of Egypt.
The city covers more than 3,000 square kilometers and includes historic and modern neighborhoods that reflect its urban diversity.
Cairo is surrounded by world-famous archaeological landmarks such as the Pyramids and the Sphinx, making it one of the oldest and most important cities in the Arab world.

cta.title: Help Build Better Arab Cities
cta.description: Join a network of municipalities, researchers, and practitioners in a pioneering experience
